nasb.text: He said, “O man of high esteem, do not be afraid. Peace be with you; take courage and be courageous!” Now as soon as he spoke to me, I received strength and said, “May my lord speak, for you have strengthened me.”

esv.text: And he said, “O man greatly loved, fear not, peace be with you; be strong and of good courage.” And as he spoke to me, I was strengthened and said, “Let my lord speak, for you have strengthened me.”

cnv.text: 他說：“大蒙眷愛的人哪！不要懼怕，願你平安，你要大大剛強。”他和我說話的時候，我就剛強起來；於是我說：“我主請說，因為你剛強了我。”

ccb.text: 他对我说：“倍受眷爱的人啊，不要怕，愿你平安！要刚强勇敢。”我听到他的话，便有了力量，于是对他说：“我主啊，请说，因为你使我有了力量。”
